CANNOT_DELETE_SELF: Admins cannot delete their own account
CANNOT_DELETE_LAST_ADMIN: Cannot delete the last remaining admin
CANNOT_DEMOTE_LAST_ADMIN: Cannot demote the last remaining admin
CATEGORY_SLUG_TAKEN: A category with slug "{slug}" already exists
ITEM_SLUG_TAKEN: An item with slug "{slug}" already exists in this category
CATEGORY_HAS_ITEMS: Category has {count} learning item(s). Move or delete them first, or deactivate the category by setting isActive=false
